CustomField.description: Per-dimension approval lifecycle for non-standard legal/payment terms (Not Required / Pending / Approved / Rejected). Automation-only: QuoteTriggerHandler escalates to Pending when Legal_Terms_Required__c is checked and the Non-Standard Terms approval process records the decision. One of the three independent dimensions (discount / legal / finance) that replace the single conflated Approval_Status__c gate.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Legal approval lifecycle. Maintained by the Quote trigger and the non-standard terms approval process.
CustomField.label: Legal Approval Status
